author: martinopolo
description: Auto-reveals the active file in the File Explorer without transferring keyboard focus. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: MartinoPolo
manifest.description: Auto-reveals the active file in the File Explorer without transferring keyboard focus.
manifest.name: Auto Reveal in Explorer

name: Auto Reveal in Explorer

releases.author: MartinoPolo
releases.description:
Fix popout window compatibility and code quality improvements.

- Use `activeDocument` instead of `document` for popout window compatibility
- Use `activeWindow.setTimeout/clearTimeout` instead of global equivalents
- Replace deprecated `builtin-modules` package with `node:module` built-in
- Fix unsafe `any` type from `loadData()`

releases.author: MartinoPolo
releases.description: Initial release of Auto Reveal in Explorer plugin.
